### Mini RSA
What happens if you have a small exponent? There is a twist though, we padded the plaintext so that (M ** e) is just barely larger than N. Let's decrypt this:[values](https://challenge-files.picoctf.net/c_wily_courier/26f56c2d4fc3ff842ad67a8a7536ba110d4b40f7b36eea831285f892795710de/values)
### Solución
Se usó el siguiente código en python.
```
>>> from gmpy2 import *
>>> from Crypto.Util.number import long_to_bytes
>>> 
>>> gmpy2.get_context().precision=2048
>>> e = 3
>>> c = 5709720175026317841944505166332182779419760031115432215563425901875620052791608163398750297304277886495537\
367793006288112991932717211066611899319963701838062828209254458935983141207100322897221021063116398621664612418813\
778554568264340430225832578491114653771121708580262264085968492732626559392615882541267670045570974444907542776294\
075571558085100930760760722416252378077610954367547852126659348372505030936460878940046808104816042562380177143194\
070773417030106158693436848897733795588156153439353374354378946281556140400056185498147808737766921652179963585037\
964078150136578302230878368862263000059181416416783313808950923297557514158129515879758935765781055731969330005473\
022370060498393105532201494698762244481915406880607127300210095672274400200661881861043562650754163743246330438392\
531433701024389754537178000821754581449881408420282753987132115940027280372196160429387747427183641264436940827271\
631231510105131701780747726012636466088768725514820344357055715523621362143648027363044170885031058505704
>>> root, exact = iroot(c, e)
>>> root
mpz()
>>> print(long_to_bytes(root))
b'                                                                                                       picoCTF{e_sh0u1d_b3_lArg3r_92f4d5a5}\n'

```

dándonos la bandera:
picoCTF{e_sh0u1d_b3_lArg3r_92f4d5a5}
### Notas
Se usó sudo python3 -m pip install pycryptodome --break-system-packages
y sudo python3 -m pip install gmpy2 --break-system-packages
